name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new parser resilience capability for higi
title: '[FEATURE] '

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when higi tries to heal..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the expected behavior of the self-healing decorator or type-coercion logic.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or examples about the feature request here.
